feed.title: Howl Street — Global Financial Wire
feed.subtitle: Loudest Howls and the Pack — auto-curated from 100+ global sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Trump reviews Iranian proposal aimed at reopening Strait of Hormuz #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The White House confirms Trump met his national security advisers on Monday to discuss the plan.

entry.title: SM Prime Q1 bottom line hovers at P11.7B #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — SM Prime Holdings Inc. posted a first-quarter net income of P11.66 billion this year. This was largely flat from the year-ago P11.65 billion, as higher costs offset modest revenue growth. In a disclosure on Tuesday, the Sy family-led property giant said its total revenues rose 2 percent to P33.3 billion. READ: SM

entry.title: LPG business keeps Pryce January-March profit at P1B #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Pryce Corp. posted a profit of P1.084 billion in the first quarter, driven by its strong liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) business. The January-March result was slightly higher than the P1.062 billion recorded in the same period last year. Pryce’s revenues rose by 3.39 percent to P5.98 billion from P5.79 billion. In a

entry.title: PAL profit up 2.6% in turbulent first quarter #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Philippine Airlines (PAL) weathered a turbulent first quarter to log a 2.6-percent increase in net income, which reached to $78.55 million. This as passenger traffic continued to grow despite airspace disruptions and rising fuel costs linked to the war in the Middle East. READ: PAL seeks wider Alaska Airlines tie-up In a

entry.title: Atlas Mining turns around with P645-M profit in Q1 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Atlas Consolidated and Mining and Development Corp. reported a net income of P645 million in the first quarter of 2025. This reversed a net loss of P404 million a year ago, driven by higher metal prices. In a disclosure on Tuesday, Atlas Mining said revenues rose by 11 percent to P4.51 billion.

entry.title: Peso touches new low of 60.97:$1 in AM trade; 61.08:$1 in PM session #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: UPDATED FOR AFTERNOON TRADING MANILA, Philippines — The Philippines’s peso slid to a record low on Tuesday, breaching the 61-per-dollar level for the first time in intraday trading READ: Peso depreciates to 60.48:$1 on Middle East war jitters In the afternoon session, the local currency touched an intraday low of 61.08, marking a fresh all-time

entry.title: Apollo Global Capital expands mining business #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Holding firm Apollo Global Capital Inc. has inked a deal with Masbate 2145 Philippines Inc. to significantly expand its presence in the local mining industry. The listed firm signed the operating agreement with Masbate 2145 through its offshore mining subsidiary, JDVC Resources Corp. The agreement covers a 15,909.33-hectare mineral property situated in

entry.title: U.S.-Iran talks stall; earnings frenzy ahead - what’s moving markets #HowlStreet #Markets

entry.title: BOJ holds interest rates; flags more hikes amid M.East inflation risks #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: BOJ holds interest rates; flags more hikes amid M.East inflation risks

entry.title: BP profits more than double as Iran war sends oil prices higher #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The energy giant said it had seen an "exceptional" performance at its oil trading business.

entry.title: WPP shares edge lower as weak client spending persists despite Q1 beat #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: WPP shares edge lower as weak client spending persists despite Q1 beat

entry.title: Earnings call transcript: Boliden Q1 2026 sees stock surge on robust results #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Earnings call transcript: Boliden Q1 2026 sees stock surge on robust results

entry.title: America's biggest career hurdle: Being a daughter #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Unpaid caregiving costs the average American woman $295,000 in lost wages and retirement savings over a lifetime, jeopardizing her financial future.

entry.title: Nifty 50 loses valuation cushion after recent rally; fuel price risk may trigger short-term correction: Emkay Global #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The divergence between domestic institutional investors (DIIs) and foreign portfolio investors (FPIs) has widened, with the gap in BSE 500 holdings increasing by 90 basis points to 154 basis points. This trend was driven by FPI outflows of $14.2 billion in Q4FY26.

entry.title: Thailand Plans 20% Electricity Price Cut for Low-Use Households #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Thailand plans to cut electricity tariffs by about 20% for households that use relatively little power, in a bid to ease living costs amid surging global energy costs, according to Energy Minister Akanat Promphan.

entry.title: China's supply chains hit by Iran war #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: China has been somewhat insulated from the immediate energy shock following the U.S.-Israel war with Iran, but Beijing hasn't been able to shield its supply chains.

entry.title: Exporters highlight compliance costs, testing requirements, MSME issues in meeting with Goyal #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The minister has assured continued support, including facilitation and targeted interventions to reduce entry barriers and enhance ease of doing business

entry.title: Iran beats Trump (at the World Snooker Championship) #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: A great day for Hossein Vafaei as he defeats Judd Trump.
